creator: tburns@hrsd.com
text:
I'm having a similar issue with a much simpler setup. It worked fine on FreeBSD 13.2. Everything is the same except upgrading from 13.2-RELEASE to 14.0-RELEASE. Do you mind updating the importance since it just just you now?

https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/carp-stopped-working-after-upgrade-from-freebsd-13-2-to-freebsd-14.93404/#post-654545
